creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
On 05.12.2011 13:18, Hiroki Sato wrote:
>   Is it correct that your rtmpdump's version is rtmpdump-2.3_1 and the librtmp.pc has
>   the "Requires: libssl,libcrypto" line even after reinstallation of
>   the port?

No. After going from 2.3 to 2.3_1 the Requires:-line becomes empty. Life is 
good... Thanks!

    -mi
